title: Webhook response unexpectedly wrapped in iframe
symptom: After updating to n8n version 1.103.2, the webhook response is wrapped in an iframe, returning HTML instead of plain text or JSON.
applies_when: Using the Respond to Webhook node
not_this_if: Webhook response is set to return JSON
root_cause: The update to version 1.103.2 introduced a change where responses from the webhook node are wrapped in an iframe for security reasons. This affects workflows that previously returned plain text or JSON, leading to unexpected output.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.104.2 or later
Verify that the webhook response is no longer wrapped in an iframe
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.104.2 to resolve the iframe wrapping issue.
